title: agrostis stolonifera var. palustris
intro: Agrostis stolonifera var. palustris, commonly known as marsh bentgrass, is a type of perennial grass that grows in wet environments, such as marshes and wet meadows. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of marsh bentgrass include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and support the immune system. Marsh bentgrass can be used to make herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a variety of ailments and promote overall health and well-being.
